Package com.uk.tsl.rfid.asciiprotocol.commands.hflf

Class RfPassThroughCommand

java.lang.Object
com.uk.tsl.rfid.asciiprotocol.commands.hflf.RfPassThroughCommand
All Implemented Interfaces:
IAsciiCommand, IAsciiCommandResponder
public class RfPassThroughCommand extends Object implements IAsciiCommand, IAsciiCommandResponder
ASCII Command to execute a Passthrough command on the Reader and capture the response

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    clearLastResponse()
    Clears the values from the last response Derived classes must call super class to ensure correct operation

    • processReceivedLine

      public boolean processReceivedLine(String fullLine, boolean moreLinesAvailable) throws Exception
      Description copied from interface: IAsciiCommandResponder
      Each correctly terminated line from the device is passed to this method for processing
      Specified by:
      processReceivedLine in interface IAsciiCommandResponder
      Parameters:
      fullLine - The line to be processed
      moreLinesAvailable - When true indicates there are additional lines to be processed (and will also be passed to this method)
      Returns:
      True if this line should not be passed to any other responder
      Throws:
      Exception
